title: Gold, cash, commodities: Jeffrey Gundlach on his portfolio strategy for 2026 amid Iran war jitters, rate uncertainity
summary: Jeffrey Gundlach advises investors to hold cash, gold, and real assets in 2026, warning against risky investments if the Fed raises rates. He recommends 20% in cash and commodities, and suggests buying gold if it dips below $3,500 an ounce, amid concerns over future debt restructuring.

title: CLARITY Act Explained: Why banks & crypto firms are fighting over reward policy — What it means for your digital wallet?
summary: The Clarity Act, aimed at regulating cryptocurrency, will be reviewed by senators next week. If approved, it will clarify asset classifications, address stablecoin policies, and potentially enhance digital asset adoption while resolving conflicts between crypto firms and banks.

title: The most important Mother’s Day gift isn’t jewelry. It’s financial independence
summary: Across every stage of motherhood — new, working, single, entrepreneurial, senior — the financial system treats women as signatories, not decision-makers. The cost of that exclusion is real, compounding, and entirely preventable.

title: Why confident predictions about markets usually get the most important things wrong
summary: Investors often build neat chains of logic from one fact to a firm conclusion. But markets are self-correcting systems, not dominoes—and straight-line thinking can be costly.
